themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 16 verses. Commentary leans on "The assembly's response to David's prayer: 'And David said to all the congregation, Now bless...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

10: Wherefore David blessed the Lord before all the congregation
26: Thus David the son of Jesse reigned over all Israel

28: and Solomon his son reigned in his stead
